artifacts.post_measurement_change: The final baseline adds benchmark-only conventional median and obsolete-cancellation validation. The final candidate additionally snapshots outer admission to close a dynamic-policy TOCTOU; timed runs used stable no-competition policy, for which measured and reviewed server paths are identical.

method.execution_command_template: KAKEHASHI_TREE_WORKER_MODE=authoritative KAKEHASHI_TREE_WORKER_THREADS=8 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_BIN_A=<first> KAKEHASHI_BENCH_BIN_B=<second> KAKEHASHI_BENCH_ITERS=30 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_WARMUP=6 KAKEHASHI_BENCH_SCENARIOS=typing_delta,typing_burst,cancel_burst KAKEHASHI_BENCH_SAMPLES_FILE=<run.json> target/release/deps/semantic_tokens-08ebd8d8c816111c
method.summary_statistic: median of four paired percent deltas; an even-sized median averages its middle values
method.validation: Every delta/full response is reconstructed client-side and the tracked semantic token must equal the latest inserted prefix before its latency sample is accepted.

interpretation: All 1,200 main-series timed responses represented the latest edit. Eligible Rust paths showed lower median latency by the reported median-of-pairs statistic, although single-edit and burst medians each regressed in one of four pairs. A separate reviewed-binary cancellation series verified all 960 obsolete responses as RequestCancelled and all 240 final responses as current; all four paired medians favored Stage 29. With 30 samples per run, p95 is the second-largest observation and its sign-changing ranges remain too unstable for a tail claim. Markdown retained generation-current discovery (debug telemetry reported regions_reused=182), so Stage 29 did not take the new undiscovered-discovery path there.

post_review_validation.purpose: Confirm the admission-snapshot fix preserves the stable no-competition path measured in the main series.
post_review_validation.interpretation: Current-token validation passed for every response. Single-edit and burst medians were within 0.3%; other sign-changing deltas remain descriptive only.

validated_cancellation_series.purpose: Verify both attribution and final-source behavior: every obsolete request must return JSON-RPC -32800 and every final token set must match the latest edit before its sample is accepted.

summary.interpretation: All four paired medians favored Stage 29; p95 remains inconclusive because one pair regressed by 32.7%.
